elements.grid_ref: between grid1 and grid2, at gridB-gridA, box '3 +3.65 3'
elements.dimension_m: 3.50 wide (grid1-2) x 1.50 deep, sub-dim 3.30 net with 0.20 edge margins each side

elements.grid_ref: along the ระเบียง edge at gridA, spans 3.50m (grid1-2)
elements.material: ราวระเบียงเหล็กกล่อง 1"x2" ทาสีน้ำมัน (top rail), เหล็กแบน (FB) ขนาด 1" หนา 6 มม ทาสีน้ำมัน (mid rail flat bar), ราวระเบียงเหล็กกล่อง 1"x1" ทาสีน้ำมัน (bottom rail)

elements.description: Section cut at the ระเบียง edge next to นอน1 (+3.75) — shows the railing embedded/anchored into the floor slab edge at +3.65, with a small 0.10-0.15-0.20 step-down profile at the slab edge; 1.50m dimension to gridB

warnings: This sheet (A-21) is a 2nd-floor balcony (ระเบียง) guardrail detail — a feature specific to this 2-story house (referenced from the floor plan หน้า07, elevation 1 หน้า09, and section 1 หน้า13, all of which call out 'ราวกันตก ดูแบบขยาย A-21'). No equivalent sheet exists in the 1-story sister houses' architecture sets, consistent with a guardrail only being needed where there is a 2nd-floor open edge.

3 distinct views inventoried on this sheet: an enlarged balcony plan (R1), a front elevation of the railing, and a section cut through the railing/slab edge — kept together in one file since all 3 describe the same single guardrail assembly, not separate structural elements.

Steel member sizes (1"x2" and 1"x1" box tube, 1"x6mm flat bar) are clearly legible; the exact anchor/embedment detail into the slab edge in the section view is smaller print and only medium confidence.
